nasb.text: It will come about at the end of seventy years that the Lord will visit Tyre. Then she will go back to her harlot’s wages and will play the harlot with all the kingdoms on the face of the earth.

esv.text: At the end of seventy years, the Lord will visit Tyre, and she will return to her wages and will prostitute herself with all the kingdoms of the world on the face of the earth.

cnv.text: 七十年後，耶和華必眷顧推羅，推羅就恢復繁榮，可以與地上的萬國交易。

ccb.text: 那时，耶和华必眷顾泰尔。她必重操旧业，与天下万国交易。

csbs.text: 到了七十年结束的时候，耶和华必眷顾提尔。那时提尔必重操旧业，与地上的万国交易。
